findings.line: She was not like them. The fear was simpler: she could keep following a line too far.
findings.deletionTest: The fear was simpler: she could keep following a line too far.
findings.reason: Pattern 2 fragment pivot; deleting the negated setup preserves the actual thought and improves directness.
findings.suggestedFix: The fear was simpler: she could keep following a line too far.

findings.line: The relay rider shifted in the saddle, not fidgeting, simply trying not to fall out of it.
findings.deletionTest: The relay rider shifted in the saddle, simply trying not to fall out of it.
findings.reason: Pattern 4 minimizer pivot; the negative qualifier is scaffolding before the real description.
findings.suggestedFix: The relay rider shifted in the saddle, fighting to stay seated.

clusterWarnings: Two road-subject kills create a repeat-noun cluster in an analytical POV section.

findings.line: The city fell behind them slowly.
findings.subject: The city
findings.realAgent: Jaina, Sylvanas, and Cyndia were the ones riding away from Stratholme.
findings.reason: The city is not moving; the riders are, so the sentence launders motion onto geography.
findings.suggestedFix: They left the city behind slowly.

findings.line: Then the road did what roads did.
findings.subject: the road
findings.realAgent: The riders and horses settled into steady travel along it.
findings.reason: The line assigns active behavior to the road instead of naming the riders' movement.
findings.suggestedFix: Then came hooves on packed earth.

findings.line: Around her, the road kept moving.
findings.subject: the road
findings.realAgent: The three riders kept moving while Jaina stayed inside the call.
findings.reason: The repeated road-subject motion turns infrastructure into the actor instead of the riders.

findings.line: The dispatch tube, her notebook, and the salt wind ahead all pointed north.
findings.subject: The dispatch tube, her notebook, and the salt wind ahead
findings.realAgent: The relay report, Jaina's notes, and the coastward air all gave Jaina concrete evidence of the same direction.
findings.reason: The sentence compresses separate clues into acting objects instead of naming the convergence directly.
findings.suggestedFix: North was there in the dispatch tube, her notebook, and the salt wind ahead.

audits.cleanReason: Checked the chapter-level caps across the seven tic families. Only two physical tightened instances and one specific weight metaphor surfaced as true candidates, all under cap; marked/shifted overload, gaze-cluster fatigue, and dialogue-tag avoidance did not exceed thresholds.

summary.verdictReason: Pass A found a repeated road-subject agency-laundering cluster (moderate) plus four mild kills across intent-smear and negation, so the pass fails.
